data.title: Add conversation search
data.description:
**Labels:** `enhancement`, `frontend`

**Description:**
Add search functionality to find messages within conversations or across conversation history.

**Proposed Solution:**
Implement client-side and/or server-side search.

**Features:**

* Search current conversation
* Search across all conversations (if persistence added)
* Highlight search results
* Filter by date, model, etc.
* Keyboard shortcuts (Cmd+F)

**Acceptance Criteria:**

- [ ] Search box in UI
- [ ] Real-time search as user types
- [ ] Results highlighted
- [ ] Navigate between results
- [ ] Clear search and reset

**Technical Considerations:**

* Client-side search with fuzzy matching
* Optional: Full-text search in D1 database
* Highlight matches in UI
* Keyboard navigation
* Debounce search input

**Effort & Value Ranking:**

* ⏱️ Time: **Medium** (search UI, indexing, highlighting, navigation)
* 🧩 Complexity: **Medium** (search algorithm, result highlighting, performance with large conversations)
* 💎 Value: **Medium** (useful feature, especially with persistent storage, but not critical)
